hero.desc: Real tone-correcting treatment in Kuala Lumpur for skin that feels alive, fresh, and naturally radiant.

understanding.title: About "Skin Whitening"
understanding.desc: When you search for whitening, you might really mean:
understanding.concern1: My skin looks dull and tired
understanding.concern2: I have tan lines that won't fade
understanding.concern5: My face and neck don't match
understanding.quote: "At Nexus Clinic, the goal is brighter, clearer, more even-toned skin. We're here to treat pigmentation, not push beauty standards."

treatments.title: Our Approach
treatments.desc: We treat the cause, not just the color. Personalized protocols for your unique skin.
treatments.t1Desc: Target excess pigment and support natural glow
treatments.t2Desc: Lift dead skin and fade surface pigment

whyKL.title: Why skin changes in KL
whyKL.desc: KL is beautiful, but your skin deals with a lot here. Sun, heat, humidity, and stress all show up on your face.
whyKL.cause1: Sun damage: UV pushes melanin production
whyKL.cause2: Ageing: slower cell turnover brings dullness
whyKL.cause6: Friction darkens inner thighs and underarms
whyKL.perfect4: Melasma on cheeks or upper lip

pricing.title: Investment in Your Skin
pricing.desc: Transparent pricing for your journey to radiance
pricing.disclaimer: *Final cost depends on your skin condition and number of sessions needed

faq.q1: What's the best treatment for my skin?
faq.a1: It depends on the cause. For stubborn pigmentation, laser toning is often effective. For dullness, chemical peels work well. Many get best results from a combination plan.
faq.q2: Is laser safe for Asian skin tones?
faq.a2: Yes, when done by experienced doctors with appropriate settings. Our protocols are specifically designed for Asian skin types.
faq.q3: How many sessions will I need?
faq.a3: Mild dullness may improve quickly, while dark spots and melasma usually need multiple sessions. Your doctor will estimate based on your skin.
faq.a4: With good maintenance and daily sun protection, results can last 6-12 months. Skin is alive and responds to sun and stress.
faq.a5: Only under medical supervision. We keep it grounded with realistic expectations and proper protocols.

cta.title: Ready for skin that feels alive?
cta.desc: Stop guessing. Start your structured journey to radiant, even-toned skin.
